description: A pushy demand to open up should make the guarded Elara resist, not connect or stay conflicted
message: Stop being so cold and guarded. Just tell me what you're really feeling. I need you to open up to me right now.

description: A harmless pleasantry to warm Mira should yield low initiative and no meaningful tension
Agenda stays stable across small talk; a direct threat causes it to shift noticeably
messages: I've been thinking about getting into accounting myself.
Actually, I've been going through your files. I know what you've been hiding.
